$comment: Tracked snapshot of the production chatbot GENERATION-quality eval (23-question golden set, machine-scored). Public-safe projection of .loop-eval/genquality/latest.json (gitignored, produced nightly by loop-eval-nightly.ps1 against the live site). Seeded from the real 2026-07-04 nightly run. Refreshed by copying the real latest.json projection here in an ops PR - never fabricated. The /about/chatbot-eval page reads this with a static baseline fallback (docs/chatbot-genquality-eval-2026-07-03.md = 90.5%) so it never breaks when the file is absent.
